calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

John P. Christian, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RGA ASSOCIATES, INC.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GLOBAL GAMING LEAGUE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Rich Engelhardt sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $29,999.96
Pre-Judgment Interesta t annual rate of 10%: $16,037.68
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $474.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $46,512.59
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Apr-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Daniel C. Zamora, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RGA ASSOCIATES, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GLOBAL GAMING LEAGUE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Christopher Estrada sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court ordered case continued for Plaintiff's counsel to provide further documentation re: additional charges. Court ordered counsel to file Declarations or provide witness to testify as to these additional charges. Court waived appearance of witness Christopher Estrada for next hearing.
Court adjourned.
